database.usage: Tracks file MD5 & timestamps to skip parsing for unchanged files.

database_schema.summary: SQLite cache tracks file metadata (path, md5, timestamp) to skip unnecessary parsing.

api_endpoints.explained: Invokes the Rust engine to scan, parse, and merge Excel files.
Extracts headers from a template file to configure the preview table.
Opens the native OS folder containing the output file.

business_rules: Cache results using MD5/Timestamp to improve retry speed.
Parallelize parsing across all available CPU cores.
User overrides take precedence over auto-detection mapping.
features: Advanced Interactive Preview (Resizable Columns, Sort & Filter)

patterns: Pipeline: Scan -> Cache-Filter -> Parse -> Aggregate -> Write
gotchas: Windows transparency mode can cause 'black box' rendering issues with Tauri. Solution: transparent: false, decorations: false.
Numeric vs String sorting in JS: Always convert to numbers before comparing for quantity columns.
conventions: Snake_case for Rust backend, camelCase for TS frontend.
